title: Basilisk (disambiguation)
content:
{{Youmay|the many uses of the word Basilisk|[[Besalisk/Legends|a similarly spelled word]]}}
'''Basilisk''' may refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Basilisk system]]''', a [[Star system]] in the [[Core Worlds]]
*'''[[Basilisk war droid]]s''', a legendary [[battle droid]] model supposedly used by the [[Mandalorian crusaders]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''''[[Basilisk (Star Destroyer)|Basilisk]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala]]
*'''[[Basilisk system/Legends|Basilisk system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]
*'''[[Basilisk]]''', a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the Basilisk system and [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the Basiliskans
*'''[[Basilisk (Mandalorian)|Basilisk]]''', a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] member of the [[Dar'manda]]
*'''[[Basiliskan]]s''', a sentient [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] species native to Basilisk
*'''[[Basilisk war droid/Legends|Basilisk war droid]]''', a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] battle droid made infamous in the [[Mandalorian Wars]]
*'''''[[Bes'uliik]]''''', a Mandalorian [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] named after the war droid

{{Disambig}}
